task: Move the silver object from the storage box to the table
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A clear plastic storage box is on a wooden table. A small silver object is inside the box. The table has other items (a blue bottle, a small black object, a yellow tool). The silver object is small and metallic, likely a screw or bolt. STRATEGY - First, reach into the storage box to grasp the silver object. Then, transport it to a destination on the table. Failure modes include not grasping the object, dropping it during transport, or placing it in an invalid location. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the storage box to locate the silver object. Step 2: Grasp the silver object from inside the box. Step 3: Transport the held object to a target area on the table. Step 4: Place the object on the table surface.
Goal: on(silver_object, table)
Scene: storage_box, silver_object, table, blue_bottle, small_black_object, yellow_tool
Step 1: reach(storage_box)
  affordance_region: the open top of the clear plastic storage box
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, storage_box, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, storage_box) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(silver_object)
  affordance_region: the small silver object inside the storage box
  contact: holding(silver_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(silver_object)
Step 3: transport(silver_object -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table surface
  spatial: above(silver_object, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(silver_object)
  done_when: above(silver_object, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(silver_object -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table surface
  contact: surface_contact(silver_object, table) [completion]; released(silver_object) [completion]
  pose: stable(silver_object) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(silver_object, table) AND released(silver_object)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the open top of the clear plastic storage box
the small silver object inside the storage box
an empty area on the table surface
an empty area on the table surface
